iotanalytics.channel.channelstorage.CfnA: Where channel data is stored. You may choose one of `serviceManagedS3`, `customerManagedS3` storage. If not specified, the default is `serviceManagedS3`. This can't be changed after creation of the channel.

iotanalytics.channel.channelstorage.Cust.Description: Used to store channel data in an S3 bucket that you manage. If customer managed storage is selected, the `retentionPeriod` parameter is ignored. You can't change the choice of S3 storage after the data store is created.

iotanalytics.channel.channelstorage.Serv.Description: Used to store channel data in an S3 bucket managed by AWS IoT Analytics. You can't change the choice of S3 storage after the data store is created.
